exit_stop_first_principles_validated_str: T18 confirms the exit-to-mean rule and the vol-scaled (3.5-sigma) catastrophe stop guards PASS, and that reverting to an oscillator-threshold exit or a fixed-2N stop (the s14-d1-cross-sector failed design) RAISES. T6 confirms exit-to-mean fires at the mean; T7 confirms 3.5-sigma stop placement; T10 confirms vol-normalized sizing. This is STRUCTURAL validation on synthetic data, NOT an edge claim (IS edge is tested at P6).
